title: aira setiformis
intro: Aira setiformis, also known as Hair Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass that grows in well-drained soils and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Aira setiformis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Aira setiformis include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
